inputs.titre: Lancement du projet 'Encyclopedia of Life', visant à documenter toutes les espèces vivantes, y compris les plantes

reason: The image depicts a modern office environment with people working at computers in cubicles. The clothing and general office setup are consistent with the late 2000s. However, there are some anachronisms, specifically the cell phones on the desks.  While cell phones existed in 2007, the style of the ones depicted are more modern. The computer monitors appear relatively accurate for the time. The architecture of the building in the background is plausibly from that era. No fantastical elements are present.
